note: Recovered full public artwork gallery from repository history.

items.title: Burned Motion / Razorback
items.alt: Burned Motion / Razorback, Woodburning / Mixed Media by Robert Marleton.
items.description: A red motion study with a charging razorback form and a rough, energetic surface. The piece leads the portfolio as a signature work.

items.title: Submersion
items.alt: Submersion, Digital Lettering / Ink Study by Robert Marleton.
items.description: A blue ink field with the word Submersion set into soft wash, suspended marks, and quiet depth.

items.title: Sunflower Mandala
items.alt: Sunflower Mandala, Digital Pattern by Robert Marleton.
items.description: A bright organic pattern study centered on a sunflower form. The piece adds warmth and structure to the collection.

items.title: Release
items.alt: Release, Lettering / Digital by Robert Marleton.
items.description: A blue lettering piece built around the word Release, with layered current-like movement surrounding the central script.

items.title: Washed Out
items.alt: Washed Out, Lettering / Digital by Robert Marleton.
items.description: A blue and violet lettering piece with the phrase Washed Out set into a soft atmospheric field.

items.title: Lest We Forget
items.alt: Lest We Forget, Digital Collage / Typographic Study by Robert Marleton.
items.description: A high-contrast digital collage centered on the phrase Lest We Forget, with red, blue, light, and rough texture layered together.

items.title: We Are Not Descended From Fearful Men
items.alt: We Are Not Descended From Fearful Men, Woodburning / Lettering by Robert Marleton.
items.description: A wood-burned lettering piece using the natural round, cracks, bark edge, and burned marks as part of the composition.

items.title: Rainline Study
items.alt: Rainline Study, Texture / Ink Study by Robert Marleton.
items.description: A vertical texture study built from repeated marks and soft color movement. It reads as surface, rhythm, and weather.

items.title: Blue Field
items.alt: Blue Field, Digital Texture by Robert Marleton.
items.description: A quiet blue texture field focused on grain, tone, and surface movement. It functions as a supporting study rather than a main signature piece.

items.title: Love Study (Title Pending)
items.alt: Love Study (Title Pending), Lettering / Texture by Robert Marleton.
items.description: A word-based texture piece centered on Love, with a worn layered surface. The final full title is still pending.

items.title: Between Waves
items.alt: Between Waves, Lettering / Water Study by Robert Marleton.
items.description: A soft lettering piece set into pale blue waterlike bands, with the phrase Between Waves moving through the lower edge.

items.title: Electric Love
items.alt: Electric Love, Digital Lettering by Robert Marleton.
items.description: A saturated lettering study built around Electric Love, with strong color, script, and a charged central word form.

items.title: Electric Love, Blue Variation
items.alt: Electric Love, Blue Variation, Digital Lettering by Robert Marleton.
items.description: A cooler blue-violet variation of Electric Love, shifting the same phrase into a deeper atmospheric register.

items.title: U R Priceless
items.alt: U R Priceless, Digital Lettering by Robert Marleton.
items.description: A direct lettering piece centered on U R Priceless, with a soft red field and handmade script.

items.title: Inkspirations Studio Mark
items.alt: Inkspirations Studio Mark, Identity Design by Robert Marleton.
items.description: A studio mark exploration using blue lettering, splash, and atmosphere. It supports the identity system around the artwork.

items.title: Studio Blue Identity Card
items.alt: Studio Blue Identity Card, Identity Design by Robert Marleton.
items.description: A compact identity card for Inkspirations Studios. It presents the studio voice in a clean public-facing format.

items.title: Inkspirations Logo Lockup
items.alt: Inkspirations Logo Lockup, Identity Design by Robert Marleton.
items.description: A clean logo lockup pairing calligraphic emphasis with the studio name. It is organized as supporting identity work.

items.title: Say No to Provoke and Blame
items.alt: Say No to Provoke and Blame, Typographic Poster by Robert Marleton.
items.description: A stark typographic poster built from scale, contrast, and compression. The visible phrase gives the piece its structure.

items.title: Small Town Teacher
items.alt: Small Town Teacher, Identity Design by Robert Marleton.
items.description: A compact identity mark with a handmade, personal tone. It shows a softer side of the studio system.

items.title: Inkspirations Coasters / Functional Art
items.alt: Inkspirations Coasters / Functional Art, Functional Art / Product Study by Robert Marleton.
items.description: A functional art project for coaster sets, usable surfaces, and product-ready studio objects. These studies connect the artwork to objects people can live with.
